name: Pineapple-Carrot-Coconut-Walnut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Beat oil, sugar, and eggs together until smooth.
3. Add dry ingredients; blend thoroughly.
4. Gradually add remaining ingredients; mix well.
5. Pour batter into two greased and floured 5x9-inch pans.
6. Bake for approximately 60 to 70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean.
7. Combine cream cheese and butter in a bowl. Blend in cocoa powder and sugar; mix well.
8. Fold in the grated carrots and chopped walnuts. Spread frosting on cooled cake.
